_comment: Hand-authored structural ledger for the add_one_using_dma Axis-2 HW smoke (#140, Plan 1). config_path(a,b) = the loaded config routes a's producer (upstream) to b's consumer (downstream). Five orientations, each a real dataflow relationship in this single-column kernel: the shim input DMA (MM2S) is upstream of the output DMA (S2MM start + its stream starvation, the spec's placement-not-causation backpressure case); the memtile lead stream port (PORT_RUNNING_0) is upstream of the trailing ports that co-fire rigidly after it. Event keys are ABSOLUTE col 1 (the decoder's space), verified against the captured run_NN/batch_00/hw/trace.events.json. NOTE: these cites are hand-asserted from dataflow knowledge; Plan 2 replaces this fixture with automated extraction from the binary's routes/BDs/locks. The engine still only admits each derive if correlates independently confirms a stable offset on the measured data.
